items.item: Gate dev login bypass to non-production
Remove public test creds from tracker + unset DEV_OTP before launch (scale #27)
Enforce amount matching in reconciliation
Wire admin console to live endpoints
Pick one settlement model, align docs with code
DB-backed integration tests (recon, settlement, idempotency)
Arabic + RTL + SYP amounts across customer app
Reminder, late-fee & dunning workers
Merchant portal redesign
Real SMS/OTP provider + abuse caps (scale #29)
EAS build pipeline + signing (iOS & Android)
Bank statement import for reconciliation
Admin portal redesign
App Store & Play Store submission, listings + review fixes
Push notifications for payment reminders
Wallet top-up & early-payoff features
Credential rotation + append-only ledger guard
Guard reconciliation & billing on goods-delivered (QA-1)
Fix settlement approve/pay race — conditional UPDATE (QA-2)
Delivery-accrual integrity sweep / outbox (QA-3)
Zero-amount guards on quote, confirm & settlement legs (QA-4)
Scope idempotency keys per user+endpoint, add TTL (QA-5)
Lock quoted terms at display — schedule + down %% (QA-7)
Per-line error isolation + summary in reconcileBatch (QA-8 / scale #19)
PIN change & forgot-PIN recovery (re-verify OTP → set new PIN; screen + endpoint guard)
Persist & expose reported-bill state + idempotent reports (BUG-006)
Partial-payment handling — balance model, allocation, over/underpayment
PII/sanctions sign-off before enabling photo-KYC (Syrian IDs → US LLM) + Anthropic retention review (PR#30)
Route-layer integration test for /kyc/extract — ocrFailed fallback + auth/schema/no-leak (PR#30)
Harden kycSubmitSchema — max lengths + nationalId format regex (PR#30)
Startup warning when kyc_photo_flow_enabled ON but ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset (PR#30)
/settings/public allowlist-guard comment — keep sensitive keys out (PR#30)
Accrual fires outside the capture txn — lost on crash / double-booked on retry (scale #13)
ledger_entries needs uniqueness on (ref_type, ref_id) — blind insert double-books (scale #14)
Merchant-payable / account balances recomputed by full-ledger SUM scan (scale #16)
runSettlement snapshots an unlocked balance — TOCTOU pays the wrong amount (scale #17)
Reconcile lock ordering risks deadlock + no batch idempotency (scale #18)
No durable retry / dead-letter for failed event listeners (scale #24)
In-memory rate limiter is per-process — limits multiply by replica count (scale #15)
OTP argon2 (~19 MB+CPU) per call, no IP cap — CPU/memory amplification (scale #26)
Dashboard GMV / status aggregates do full-table scans — missing indexes (scale #20)
List endpoints unpaginated — grow O(history) with no LIMIT/cursor (scale #21)
Monthly-reconcile non-sargable user lookup + missing due_date index (scale #22)
Postgres pool unsized (max 10) + getSetting uncached on every hot request (scale #23)
Money mutation routes carry no Idempotency-Key — only DB state guards (scale #25)
KYC submit buffers 12 MB + parses before auth, no rate limit, base64 photos in PG (scale #28)

items.title: Placeholder bank account shown on Pay (`SY00 1234 5678 9012`)
items.note: hardcoded in pay.tsx; fine for test days, MUST come from platform settings before launch or customers transfer to a fake IBAN

items.title: Quote/confirm screen shows USD, not SYP
items.note: money path in a SYP market; `amountSyp`/`downPaymentSyp` already in the API response, just unused

items.title: Hardcoded FX fallback (13000 SYP/USD)
items.note: home.tsx + profile.tsx default when profile is null → wrong SYP figures shown as real; show `—` instead

items.title: `getMe` 404 on boot strands the user
items.note: a non-401 boot failure doesn't clear the dead token → onboarding loop; treat non-2xx as logout

items.title: Purchase confirm is not retry-safe (no Idempotency-Key)
items.note: backend supports it; a timeout after commit shows an error while the loan exists, retry → 409

items.title: "Reported payment" state reverts on reload — not persisted/read-back
items.note: repro: tap "I've made the transfer" → pill shows "Reported · awaiting confirmation", but navigating away or reopening reverts it to the button (report IS saved server-side, statement doesn't expose it). Should stay reported until admin reconciles. Needs statement to return per-bill report status + idempotent (deduped) reporting. FE+BE

items.title: `getTransaction` types `merchantName` but backend never returns it
items.note: undefined-at-runtime landmine; join merchants in the detail route or narrow the FE type

items.title: `/me` over-returns PII (nationalId, address, DOB, occupation)
items.note: FE ignores them but the contract ships more than the `Me` type admits

items.title: KYC photos sent as multi-MB base64 — timeout/413 risk on slow networks
items.note: downscale with ImageManipulator before submit; current quality:0.4 with no resize

items.title: Language → Arabic needs an app restart for full RTL on native, no feedback
items.note: show a "restart required" prompt or trigger a controlled reload on native

items.title: Quote/loan dates render as raw ISO, not localized
Hardcoded hex colors instead of theme tokens (esp. `#C04848` sign-out)
items.note: off-brand red; replace structural hex with `theme.color.*`

items.title: Installments returned unordered
items.note: add `orderBy(sequence)` in `listInstallmentsByTransaction`; schedule can render out of order

items.title: Frozen account shows "exceeds your credit" on quote
items.note: wrong message for a frozen customer (canAfford is false when frozen)

items.title: Missing accessibility labels on icon-only controls
items.note: scan FAB + home bell have no accessibilityLabel

items.title: WhatsApp support number env var unset → broken support button
items.note: `EXPO_PUBLIC_WHATSAPP_OPS` not set; disable button when empty + set for builds

items.title: Profile progress bar shows a phantom 10% at tier boundaries
Some transaction/installment statuses untranslated (overdue, returned, etc.)
items.note: only 7 statuses mapped; others fall back to raw English in Arabic

items.title: No partial-payment handling — installments are binary paid/unpaid
items.note: reconcile ignores the received amount (a small transfer marks the full installment paid); no balance/`partially_paid` state, monthly bill is all-or-nothing. Underpayment overcredits, leaves no residual. Needs balance model + allocation + over/underpayment (builds on the "Enforce amount matching" roadmap fix)
